nasb.text: All the officers and all the people rejoiced and brought in their levies and dropped them into the chest until they had finished.

esv.text: And all the princes and all the people rejoiced and brought their tax and dropped it into the chest until they had finished.

cnv.text: 眾領袖和人民都歡歡喜喜把稅款帶來，投進櫃中，直到他們都投完了。

ccb.text: 全体首领和民众都高高兴兴地把银子带来投进箱子里，直到箱子满了。
